column1: The t20wc_clean table contains consolidated information about each T20 World Cup match, including participating teams, scores, venue, result, and innings-level outcomes. It serves as the match dimension in the star schema and is referenced by both batting and bowling fact tables using the match identifier.

The player_info_clean table contains cleaned and normalized player metadata, including player names, team affiliation, playing role, and batting/bowling characteristics. It is used as the player dimension and is referenced by both batting and bowling fact tables through the player_id.

The batting_summary_clean table records detailed batting statistics for each player in a match, including runs scored, balls faced, boundary counts, strike rate, and dismissal information. It serves as a fact table in the star schema and links player and match dimensions using foreign keys.

The bowling_summary_clean table records detailed batting statistics for each player in a match, including runs scored, balls faced, boundary counts, strike rate, and dismissal information. It serves as a fact table in the star schema and links player and match dimensions using foreign keys.
